calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Sep-22-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Wrug Ved appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Mr. Ved confirmed that he is requesting to remove Wells Fargo Bank as the Trustee and appoint Schwab as the Successor Trustee, stated that Schwab has consented to serve, that some modifications to the language of the trust terms needed to be made via a non-judicial settlement agreement so that Schwab can legally take over, that the $25,000,000.00 of profit requirement is at the entity level and includes the affiliates of the Trustee, and that they needed to reduce the trustee requirement of having served for a term of twenty five years to ten years. The Petition for Modification of Trust Terms is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Continued To Sep-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Jun-29-2020 Continued To Aug-31-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Wrug Ved appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it is not sure this is something that the Court can grant, that the Father wanted an intuitional Trustee of at least $25,000,000.00 in assets with at least 25 years of active administration of trusts, and that the Court does not know how much is in the trust and whether the trust is funded. Mr. Ved stated that the trust was funded with $5,000.00 in 1988 by his Father, that the current value of the trust is 600,000.00, and that he would like to take the funds and invest them in a life insurance policy for his Mother to earn a better return. The Court noted that what is being requested is a material change to the trust. Mr. Ved stated that the corporate Trustee that is managing the trust is doing nothing, that he would like the insurance company to manage and invest in order to grow the assets, that he would like to amend the petition, that the Trustee fee is 2% and that it is impacting the return they are receiving. The Petition for Modification of Trust Terms is continued to August 31, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Ved to look into whether he will be amending his petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jun-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Continued To Apr-06-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Neema Ghannadi for Petitioner, Wrung Arunkumar Ved, via Court Call.

Mr. Ghannadi stated that the goal is to remove Wells Fargo as trustee, purchase a life insurance policy for the mother, the petitioner would be the trustee, that a consent has been filed for the petitioner to not charge a fee as trustee. The Court noted the trust was established in 1986 when the children were younger. Mr. Ghannadi stated the children have children of their own now, that the life insurance policy will provide for the children and the children's children, that the mother was an anesthesiologist with a net worth of $7 million, and her financial well-being is well covered. The Court noted the trust is to provide for the mother and inquired whether contingent beneficiaries have been notified. Mr. Ghannadi stated the mother and 2 children are the beneficiaries, that they have all been notified, that there are no contingent beneficiaries, and that he will have to look back to check as he believes the trust is also meant to benefit the children. The Court noted that this would be cutting the mother out of the trust and there is the remaining issue of whether the children's children would be contingent beneficiaries and if they are minors, guardian ad litem will be needed. Mr. Ghannadi requested the matter be continued for him to explore further.

The Petition for Modification of Trust Terms is continued to April 6, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

Petition For Modification Of Trust Terms
